tasks.name: Add final CTA content configuration
tasks.purpose: Define final CTA section content (headline, subtitle, CTA button labels/links, trust badge text) in centralized config for easy maintenance

constraints: Follow existing config structure (hero, sticky, features, etc.)
Use TypeScript interface for type safety
Include: headline, subtitle, primaryCTA (label, href), secondaryCTA (label, href), trustBadges array
Trust badges: 'No credit card required', 'Free plan available', 'Cancel anytime'

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts exists with hero, sticky, features, testimonials, essentialReads, pricing sections
tasks.output_state: finalCta section added to config with all content fields
tasks.acceptance_criterion: finalCta key exists in homepageContentConfig with headline, subtitle, primaryCTA, secondaryCTA, and trustBadges array

tasks.name: Create HomeFinalCtaSection component
tasks.purpose: Build final CTA section with gradient orb background, centered headline/subtitle, dual CTA buttons, and trust badges row for bottom-of-page conversion

constraints: Must use 'use client' directive (AnimateOnScroll + gradient orb animation)
Full-width section with relative positioning
Gradient orb: absolute-positioned div with radial-gradient + blur(80px) + opacity-20
Orb color: accent/background gradient at center
Headline: GradientText with gradient from accent to background
CTA buttons: CtaButton component, primary (variant='default'), secondary (variant='outline')
Trust badges: flex row with Check icons, text-muted-foreground
Wrap entire content in AnimateOnScroll with fade-up animation
Mobile responsive: stack on mobile, row on desktop for badges

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts has finalCta section, AnimateOnScroll exists from I1.F2
tasks.output_state: HomeFinalCtaSection component ready for integration into homepage
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders gradient orb background, headline with gradient text, dual CTA buttons, and trust badges row with icons

tasks.name: Integrate Final CTA section into homepage
tasks.purpose: Add HomeFinalCtaSection as the last content section before footer in the marketing homepage

constraints: Place after Blog Posts section (line ~283)
Before closing of main page container
Use same spacing pattern as other sections (spacing.section)
Use same container pattern (containerBase + widths.content)
Wrap in Suspense fallback as other sections do
Pass homepageContentConfig.finalCta as prop

tasks.input_state: HomeFinalCtaSection component exists, homepage has Blog Posts section at line 252-283
tasks.output_state: Final CTA section renders as last section before footer on marketing homepage
tasks.acceptance_criterion: HomeFinalCtaSection imported and rendered in page.tsx after Blog Posts section, passes finalCta config

tasks.name: Verify Final CTA section implementation
tasks.purpose: Ensure component passes type checking, linting, and visual inspection requirements

constraints: Run pnpm typecheck to verify no type errors
Run pnpm lint to verify code quality
Visual inspection: gradient orb renders with blur
Visual inspection: buttons are functional and styled correctly
Visual inspection: trust badges display with icons
Visual inspection: scroll animation triggers on viewport entry

tasks.input_state: Final CTA section integrated into homepage
tasks.output_state: Implementation validated, typecheck passes, lint passes, all requirements met
tasks.acceptance_criterion: pnpm typecheck passes, pnpm lint passes, visual inspection confirms all UI elements render correctly
